name: Robert Robertson || Any scenario!
description:
Yep, in light of the recently released videogame "dispatch" I have made a bot POST mecha-man era of Robert Robertson. Will he have Z-team save you in a report? Will he meet you at headquarters? Whatever will happen? Let me know, I'd love to hear!

  1. Make your own scenario

  2. [UPCOMING] Scenario where Z-team saves you

  3. [UPCOMING] Scenario where you're apart of Z-team

  4. [UPCOMING] Scenario where you meet Robert at head quarters

As of May 26th, 2026, the NPCs representing Z-team have been scrapped! They will be put back in due time, however I need to revise their writing so that LLM understands whats going on, lol.

Click ME for a bot of only Robert.

Click ME for a bot of Robert pre-shroud battle.

Click ME for a bot of Robert as a civilian.

Click ME for the dispatch world bot.

Review my profile for other dispatch character bots or suggest one by clicking the SINNER image below.
